refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns TRUE if A's bounding box is to the right of B's.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The &> operator returns TRUE if the bounding box of raster A overlaps or is to the right of the bounding box of raster B, or more accurately, overlaps or is NOT to the left of the bounding box of raster B.

note.para: This operand will make use of any indexes that may be available on the geometries.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT A.rid As a_rid, B.rid As b_rid, A.rast &> B.rast As overright FROM dummy_rast AS A CROSS JOIN dummy_rast AS B;
a_rid | b_rid | overright -------+-------+---------- 2 | 2 | t 2 | 3 | t 2 | 1 | t 3 | 2 | f 3 | 3 | t 3 | 1 | f 1 | 2 | f 1 | 3 | t 1 | 1 | t
